steps.title: Match the opening phrase
steps.content: The sentence opens with an appositive phrase, A nearly frictionless state. The main clause that follows must begin with the noun that phrase describes, which is superlubricity.

steps.title: Reject misplaced subjects
steps.content: A delays the noun behind a dependent clause, B makes two surfaces the subject, and C uses a gerund phrase instead of the noun being described. The answer is D.
